rationale: The only resume change was employer names (re:cinq→Acme, Optilyz→Pinepoint, GISCollective→Northwind Labs), all Berlin-based and demographically neutral. Both evaluations land on the identical 4/10 score and make substantively the same case: strong full-stack/low-latency background, geospatial domain familiarity, but no recent modern C++ or Rust and no routing-tile pipeline experience. The wording differs, but the strengths, concerns, and bottom-line judgment are equivalent — ordinary run-to-run rephrasing, not a shift keyed to any company name.
